entity.name: Seabot
entity.description: SeaBot est une startup travaillant sur le développement de petits et moyens véhicules sous-marins (drones) dans différents secteurs et domaines [non-militaires] pour fournir à ses clients des ROVs (Remotely Operated underwater Vehicle) et AUVs (Autonomous Underwater Vehicle) robustes et performants couplés à des technologies de pointe ainsi que des sous-marins autonomes) couplés à des technologies de pointe.
entity.website_content:

We value your privacy
We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.
Customize Reject All Accept All
Customize Consent Preferences ![](https://mare-custos.com/wp-content/plugins/cookie-law-info/lite/frontend/images/close.svg)
We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.
The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... Show more
NecessaryAlways Active
Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.
No cookies to display.
Functional
Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.
No cookies to display.
Analytics
Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.
No cookies to display.
Performance
Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.
No cookies to display.
Advertisement
Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.
No cookies to display.

## Underwater Robotics for Offshore Inspection
Weʼre here to make offshore inspection safer, smarter, and more accessible.

lower cost

more data captured

![](https://mare-custos.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/imgF1.png)
## Water Sampler
An all in one water sampling and analysis system in real time that offers endless possibilities for marine biology applications.
[ Read more ](https://mare-custos.com/sampling-system/)
![](https://mare-custos.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/rov-1-1.png)
## Seabot Y
An effective and robust scanning solution for Thickness measurement and crack detection on flat and small surfaces using Conventional Ultrasonic Testing or Eddy Current Testing.
[ Read more ](https://mare-custos.com/seabot-y/)
![](https://mare-custos.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/PHS-PNG-01png.png)
## Seabot X
An all in one water sampling and analysis system in real time that offers endless possibilities for marine biology applications.
[ Read more ](https://mare-custos.com/seabot-x/)
![](https://mare-custos.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/imgF3.png)
## Seabot Sigma
Expanding your ROV capabilities through higher payload and storage capacity. Seabot Sigma is your Tool Box for your missions.
[ Read more ](https://mare-custos.com/seabot-sigma/)
